title: Libanothamnus tamanus
taxonomy: Libanothamnus tamanus is classified within the family Rutaceae, which is commonly known as the citrus or rue family. It belongs to the order Sapindales and the clade rosids. The genus Libanothamnus is a monotypic genus, meaning that it contains only one species. Libanothamnus tamanus is native to the island of Socotra off the coast of Yemen in the Arabian Sea. This species is part of the broader plant diversity found in the Socotra archipelago.
